profile.name: Renan Berto
profile.title: Software Engineer + DevOps Engineer
profile.headline: I design, build and operate production software across backend development, cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes, automation, security, observability and AI engineering workflows.
summary: I build software that survives production.
Based in Lisboa, working with global engineering teams.
My work moves between application code and infrastructure: writing services, automating systems, operating Kubernetes, protecting edges and using AI to improve engineering workflows.
I like building systems that are simple to operate, observable and useful in production.

professionalPersonal.workingStyle: I like building systems that are simple to operate, observable and useful in production.
professionalPersonal.availability: Open to relevant technical conversations, global opportunities and engineering collaboration.

projects.title: OpenRoot OS
projects.problem: Technical portfolios usually look generic and fail to show how engineers think.
projects.context: The project started as a static terminal portfolio and evolved into a reusable operating-system-inspired framework.
constraints: Single source of truth for content
projects.solution: Explorer Mode and Profile Mode powered by shared structured content, plugins and a virtual filesystem.
projects.impact: Turns a personal portfolio into a reusable engineering product.
lessons: A portfolio can be a product
The same content can serve technical and non-technical audiences

projects.title: AWS WAF Security Cases
projects.problem: Credential stuffing and abusive traffic patterns threaten account safety.
projects.context: Security controls need to reduce abuse without blocking legitimate users.
projects.solution: Edge controls with AWS WAF, CloudFront, Bot Control, CAPTCHA strategy and operational visibility.
projects.impact: Practical security engineering with telemetry and rollout thinking.
lessons: Security is a traffic problem too

projects.title: AWS Certificate Validator
projects.problem: Certificates can expire silently across endpoints, files, keystores and AWS accounts.
projects.solution: Multi-account validation workflow with persistence and notifications.
projects.impact: Transforms hidden certificate risk into visible operational signals.
lessons: Expiration checks should not depend on memory

projects.title: Bemod
projects.problem: Different AI tasks need different models, latency and cost profiles.
projects.solution: A local/cloud model routing experiment using Ollama, LiteLLM and FastAPI.
lessons: Local and cloud models should coexist

projects.title: Corly
projects.problem: Real estate and financing workflows are often scattered across spreadsheets and tools.
projects.solution: CRM and workflow platform concept for leads, proposals, contracts and commissions.
projects.impact: Shows product thinking applied to operational workflows.
lessons: Business roles should shape the system model

projects.title: Jira + Confluence AI
projects.problem: Support teams repeat answers already documented in knowledge bases and previous tickets.
projects.solution: AI-assisted retrieval workflow with evidence-based recommendations.
projects.impact: Uses AI as targeted operational leverage.
lessons: AI is most useful when grounded

principles: Automation is documentation in executable form.
Prefer boring production over clever production.
AI should amplify engineers, not replace engineering.
Every incident should leave the system better.

experience.summary: 10+ years working across software engineering, DevOps, cloud infrastructure, Linux systems, automation, observability, security and production operations.

architecture.summary: OpenRoot OS is a static TypeScript monorepo with reusable packages, structured knowledge content and a GitHub Pages deployment target.

layers.name: Application shell
layers.details: Vite app that composes the terminal, filesystem, inspector, themes and command palette.

layers.name: Runtime packages
layers.details: Core command registry, shell runtime, virtual filesystem, terminal renderer, profile renderer and plugins.

layers.name: Knowledge content
layers.details: JSON content mounted into the virtual filesystem and exported to static public API files.

layers.name: Deployment
layers.details: Static GitHub Pages build with validation, content generation and static audit steps.

caseStudies.summary: Case studies convert project entries into problem, constraint, decision and impact narratives.

items.title: OpenRoot OS
items.problem: Generic portfolios do not expose engineering judgment.
items.decision: Use an operating-system metaphor with a real filesystem, terminal commands and structured knowledge.
items.impact: Makes portfolio content inspectable, searchable and reusable.

items.title: AWS WAF Security Cases
items.problem: Abusive traffic needs controls that do not block legitimate users.
items.decision: Combine edge rules, bot controls, CAPTCHA strategy and visibility.
items.impact: Frames security as an operational traffic-management problem.

items.title: Jira + Confluence AI
items.problem: Support knowledge is often repeated manually.
items.decision: Ground recommendations in retrieved evidence instead of free-form generation.

downloads.summary: Static download targets exposed by the portfolio. Missing assets stay explicit until files are added.

seo.summary: SEO baseline for openroot.tech with static metadata, sitemap, robots file and content-rich public pages.
checks: Readable professional content in inspector panels

accessibility.summary: Accessibility baseline focused on keyboard navigation, semantic labels, visible focus paths and readable static content.
checks: Filesystem search has an accessible label
Decorative icons are hidden from assistive technology
Content remains available as text inside static panels
